text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I wander along the<n>riverbank...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heh, Opera O. Are you here to watch<n>the sunset
too?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Not quite. I've come here... to make<n>an oath.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...An oath?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Indeed. To the setting sun himself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
He must be ill at ease. For to<n>think—what should
become of this<n>world without his glorious light?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I thought it only fitting that I be the one<n>to console
him—and give my word as<n>the rising Centurial
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Sun. You may rest in peace. I<n>vow to
illuminate the world in your<n>stead.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (What the heck?!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
(What's with the "Overlord" title?!<n>There's no
way she can make a<n>promise with the sun! This
is all so<n>freakin'...)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (So freakin' coooool!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, uh... Actually, now you mention it...<n>I was
thinkin' of making an oath to<n>the sun too.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well now. Could you promise<n>anything grander
than enshrining the<n>operatic conquest of the
undefeated<n>Overlord?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: En...shrining? Uh, t-totally! 'Course I<n>can!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My oath is to become the star of any<n>distance!
To win more G1s than<n>anyone ever, and show
the world<n>what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make my legacy shine<n>brighter than
all others! And then I'll<n>make a ginormous statue
of myself!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I swear I'll make a name for myself.<n>A name that
shines brighter than the<n>sun itself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Excellent!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, your ambition is indisputably...<n>cool! I
daresay your coolness could<n>even rival my
elegance!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. ♪ Well, I mean, uh... that's<n>just me,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Say, do you have some spare time?<n>Let us share
all of our vows with the<n>sun.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Opera O, it'd be my honor!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The pair run off down the riverbank,<n>chasing the
sun's last glimmer over<n>the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Uh, what is up with those two?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I came here to do some solo training,<n>but now I
can't concentrate at all!
